svg.text: Two async props streaming independently — each Suspense boundary fills at its own pace

g.text: React: Renders with two Suspense fallbacks
Header visible, both data areas show "Loading..."
Page is interactive! Users can scroll, click header...
Rails: emit("reviews", data) — first prop streams
Reviews appear instantly! Recs still loading...
Rails: emit("recs", data) — second prop streams
Full page rendered — each section streamed independently
Each async prop streams independently — reviews appear after 1s while recommendations are still loading!
Users see partial content immediately and can interact with it. No need to wait for the slowest query.
This is progressive enhancement at its best — fast data arrives fast, slow data streams in when ready.
